analysis: Ablation with soft Multiplicative Fusion: S = V_norm * (T ** 0.5). Achieved 75.16% validation accuracy. Softening the taxonomic mask degraded performance further compared to strict multiplication (75.43%) or pure visual (75.65%). Overall, masking or combining visual prototypes with taxonomic metadata consistently underperforms simply relying completely on the multi-layer visual prototypes (alpha=1.0).
